title: LootBeams Fabric Updated
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod for 1.20.1 that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!
body:
# An [Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootbeams-fabric) Fabric fork version of [LootBeams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-beams)(for Forge)

A 1.20.1 Fabric client-side Minecraft mod that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!

Loot Beams are added to all items by default and they change colors depending on the items name. You can, however, specify a whitelist/blacklist for Beams, color overrides, and even NBT tags to change their color! (like `"lootbeams.color:"0xFFFFFF"`).

Beams also have nametags that show up when looking at an item or crouching so you can see what an item is without even picking it up. This mod is client-side, meaning it will run on vanilla servers and forge servers that do not have this mod installed!

## But what are the differences of another fork?
I've ported it to 1.20.1 as previous was stuck. Also i've added translation support and overhauled fade from forge version (original implementation are less flexible and has visual bugs)
